description: Canonical proposal domains for Elysia system. Canonical domains are hardcoded in code. Extended domains can be added here.

domain_descriptions.elysia_core: Core Elysia orchestration, task management, and system architecture
domain_descriptions.hestia_scraping: Property data scraping, web automation, and data collection
domain_descriptions.legal_pipeline: Legal document analysis, evidence archive, and RAG workflows
domain_descriptions.infra_observability: Infrastructure monitoring, logging, and system observability
domain_descriptions.persona_mutation: Persona management, identity evolution, and mutation controls

notes: Canonical domains are defined in ProposalDomain enum and cannot be removed
Extended domains can be added here but should be used sparingly
All proposals must have exactly one primary domain
Domains enable filtering, parallelization, and ownership assignment
